_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Companion to blood-glucose-mgdl.json -- see that fixture's _comment for the shared unit-ambiguity reasoning. This is the most-of-the-rest-of-the-world mmol/L fixture variant; assumed field name `blood_glucose.mmol_per_l`. Never converted against the mg/dL variant -- SyncKit's TypeMapper.decideBloodGlucose passes each straight through in its own HKUnit (HKUnit.moleUnit(with: .milli, molarMass: HKUnitMolarMassBloodGlucose).unitDivided(by: .liter())), performing no mg/dL<->mmol/L arithmetic itself. Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.bloodGlucoseMmolLPoint().
